Root scaffold.description: Entry point — every .openui program starts here. root is always the first line for optimal streaming.

Stack (horizontal row).description: Horizontal Stack with explicit gap. Use direction "row" for side-by-side layouts.

Card with header.description: Card with CardHeader. Card is always full width and flexes in row/wrap layouts.

Form with rules.description: Form container with explicit Buttons reference. Always pass Buttons as the third Form arg.

FormControl with input.description: Form field bound to $fieldName state. Available rules: required, email, min, max, minLength, maxLength, pattern, url, numeric.

Table (column-oriented).description: Data table — column-oriented. Each Col holds its own data array. Use array pluck: data.rows.fieldName.

Tabs.description: Tabbed container. value is the unique id, trigger is the tab label.

Modal (with $show).description: Modal dialog. $show is a reactive boolean — set to true to open. X/Escape/backdrop auto-close. Put Form with buttons inside children.

Callout (success toast).description: Success toast — auto-dismisses after 3s when $show is set true. Use @Set($show, true) in save action.

Callout (error).description: Error callout. No $visible binding — pair with conditional render: result.status == "error" ? errName : null

Button with Action.description: Button that fires an Action. Common: @Set($var, value), @Mutation("name", {args}).

Select bound to $var.description: Select dropdown bound to a $variable. First arg is the binding.

Conditional render.description: Conditional rendering — renders second when condition is truthy, null otherwise. Common: $editId != "" ? editForm : null.
